Updates - Yet another Aadhaar-enabled scam: When will the government wake up?
image:image.image:caption: Students in six districts in Jharkhand had Aadhaar numbers fingerprints taken, scholarships disbursed in their names, but barely got a fraction of the scholarships transfers, if at all anything, stated Indian Express report (source: https://indianexpress.com/article/express-exclusive/scholarship-scam-direct-benefit-transfer-6911896/)

Updates - Poorest Adivasi in Chhattisgarh cannot get pensions after Aadhaar glitches
image:image.image:caption: Kondaha Ram, a Nagesia Adivasi, of a particularly vulnerable tribal group, is not able to get his pension amount of Rs 4.500 because of Aadhaar glitches.

image:image.image:title: Updates - Poorest Adivasi in Chhattisgarh cannot get pensions after Aadhaar glitches
image:image.image:caption: Sarojini, a Kanwar Adivasi, cannot get her disability pension anymore because of errors in Aadhaar linking. An amount of Rs 4,550 has been denied to her in Aadhaar errors.

image:image.image:title: Updates - Poorest Adivasi in Chhattisgarh cannot get pensions after Aadhaar glitches
image:image.image:caption: Budhram , a Majhwar Adivasi, has been denied his pensionof Rs 2,150 because of Aadhaar linking errors.

image:image.image:title: Updates - Poorest Adivasi in Chhattisgarh cannot get pensions after Aadhaar glitches
image:image.image:caption: Sukhmania Kanwar, an elderly Adivasi pensioner has been denied a pension amount of Rs 4,550 because of problems in Aadhaar authentication.

image:image.image:title: Updates - Poorest Adivasi in Chhattisgarh cannot get pensions after Aadhaar glitches
image:image.image:caption: The state owes Suni Bai a pension of Rs 4,990. She has been denied her pension because of mismatches in Aadhaar details and is unable to get redress.

image:image.image:title: Myths - "Aadhaar is identity for those who lack an identity."
Myths - "Aadhaar is identity for those who lack an identity."
Myths - "Aadhaar is a voluntary ID scheme. No services are linked to Aadhaar per se."
Myths - "Aadhaar is based fully on consent."
Myths - "Aadhaar law has privacy protections comparable to the best in the world."
Myths - Aadhaar is meant to "target subsidies."
Rethink Aadhaar

image:image.image:caption: The trials of having an “updated” Aadhaar are numerous, reports Devahuti Sarkar in TheWire.in

Take Action
Press Coverage - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: Aparna Kalra in the news site TheWire.in documents the distress of Indian residents excluded from basic services such as schools over lack of timely and accurate Aadhaar updates and enrolment. Introduced with a promise of efficiency, the real everyday experience of those forced to get Aadhaar is captured by Kalra who found that “slight spelling anomalies and mismatched fingerprints keep a child out of school or a family from their ration entitlements.” https://thewire.in/special/tears-queues-and-a-never-ending-search-for-kagaz-the-real-story-of-aadhaar Illustration: Pariplab Chakraborty in TheWire.in

image:image.image:title: Campaign 2025 - Make it stand out
image:image.image:caption: A protest by Delhi residents against imposing Aadhaar for social services.
